testsuite.name: com.swaglabs.testscripts.LoginpageTest

testcase.name: verifyLoginBtnFunctionalityWithBlankPassword
testcase.system-out: Test Passed Actual Error msg is as Expected : Epic sadface: Password is required

testcase.name: verifyLoginBtnFunctionalityWithValidCredentials
testcase.system-out: Test Passed Product Title is visible
